title: Foundation checkpoint
subtitle: Put the first patterns together.
overview: Review the first foundation skills and read the conversation aloud several times.
Read the English aloud, check the Chinese meaning, then repeat with a natural rhythm.

sections.title: Tiny focus
rows: I can say what I need.
我能在听不懂时修复对话。

items.en: I can speak a little English.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hello, my name is Daniel. Nice to meet you.
lines.zh: 你好，我叫 Daniel。很高兴认识你。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Nice to meet you too. Do you study English?
lines.zh: 我也很高兴认识你。你学习英语吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Yes, I study English every day.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: That is great. Can you speak English?

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I can speak a little English, but please speak slowly.
lines.zh: 我会说一点英语，但是请说慢一点。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Of course. You are doing well.

items.en: Say it slowly, then say it naturally.
I can use this sentence today.
items.zh: 我今天就能使用这个句子。
